allow: Bash("C:/Program Files/MariaDB 12.1/bin/mariadb.exe" -u root -e "SELECT user, host, plugin FROM mysql.user;")

Bash(cd "f:/AByte-POS/frontend/src/pages" && for file in sales/Orders.tsx sales/Quotations.tsx sales/Invoices.tsx sales/GiftCards.tsx sales/CreditSales.tsx sales/Coupons.tsx sales/SalesTargets.tsx; do
  sed -i \\
    -e 's/bg-blue-\\\([0-9]*\\\)/bg-emerald-\\1/g' \\
    -e 's/bg-indigo-\\\([0-9]*\\\)/bg-emerald-\\1/g' \\
    -e 's/bg-purple-\\\([0-9]*\\\)/bg-emerald-\\1/g' \\
    -e 's/text-blue-\\\([0-9]*\\\)/text-emerald-\\1/g' \\
    -e 's/text-indigo-\\\([0-9]*\\\)/text-emerald-\\1/g' \\
    -e 's/text-purple-\\\([0-9]*\\\)/text-emerald-\\1/g' \\
    -e 's/ring-blue-\\\([0-9]*\\\)/ring-emerald-\\1/g' \\
    -e 's/ring-indigo-\\\([0-9]*\\\)/ring-emerald-\\1/g' \\
    -e 's/ring-purple-\\\([0-9]*\\\)/ring-emerald-\\1/g' \\
    -e 's/border-blue-\\\([0-9]*\\\)/border-emerald-\\1/g' \\
    -e 's/border-indigo-\\\([0-9]*\\\)/border-emerald-\\1/g' \\
    -e 's/border-purple-\\\([0-9]*\\\)/border-emerald-\\1/g' \\
    -e 's/from-blue-\\\([0-9]*\\\)/from-emerald-\\1/g' \\
    -e 's/from-indigo-\\\([0-9]*\\\)/from-emerald-\\1/g' \\
    -e 's/from-purple-\\\([0-9]*\\\)/from-emerald-\\1/g' \\
    -e 's/to-blue-\\\([0-9]*\\\)/to-emerald-\\1/g' \\
    -e 's/to-indigo-\\\([0-9]*\\\)/to-emerald-\\1/g' \\
    -e 's/to-purple-\\\([0-9]*\\\)/to-emerald-\\1/g' \\
    -e 's/hover:bg-blue-\\\([0-9]*\\\)/hover:bg-emerald-\\1/g' \\
    -e 's/hover:bg-indigo-\\\([0-9]*\\\)/hover:bg-emerald-\\1/g' \\
    -e 's/hover:bg-purple-\\\([0-9]*\\\)/hover:bg-emerald-\\1/g' \\
    -e 's/hover:text-blue-\\\([0-9]*\\\)/hover:text-emerald-\\1/g' \\
    -e 's/hover:text-indigo-\\\([0-9]*\\\)/hover:text-emerald-\\1/g' \\
    -e 's/hover:text-purple-\\\([0-9]*\\\)/hover:text-emerald-\\1/g' \\
    -e 's/focus:ring-blue-\\\([0-9]*\\\)/focus:ring-emerald-\\1/g' \\
    -e 's/focus:ring-indigo-\\\([0-9]*\\\)/focus:ring-emerald-\\1/g' \\
    -e 's/focus:ring-purple-\\\([0-9]*\\\)/focus:ring-emerald-\\1/g' \\
    "$file"
  echo "Done: $file"
done)
